title: What do you think Gendo was like at Shinjis age
display_title: What do you think Gendo was like at Shinjis age
wikitext:
[]: What do you think Gendo was like at Shinji's age?             Quote Post by ShinjiNeverGivesUp » Fri Jun 24, 2016 5:43 pm Was he already a total badass like he is during the main story? Was he a gentle, withdrawn boy at 14 like Shinji is? What do you think he was like?

[]: Re: What do you think Gendo was like at Shinji's age?             Quote Post by Ray » Fri Jun 24, 2016 7:43 pm I always point to the Angelic Days Manga when people ask this question.

[]: Re: What do you think Gendo was like at Shinji's age?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Fri Jun 24, 2016 8:08 pm Probably very similar to the way he was in college. A brusque, standoffish loner who gets into fights. A rogue bull on a short tether, I believe Fuyutsuki callled him.

[]: Re: What do you think Gendo was like at Shinji's age?             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Jun 24, 2016 9:10 pm I'd bet he was a young delinquent from a broken or abusive home, possibly a single father who was always absent while diligently working in some generic office setting. The kind of kid who is smart enough to depress his teachers with his wasted potential and lack of effort. A smart kid with little guidance and no effective supervision is sure to be running with the wrong crowd, possibly even a street gang or organized crime outfit who always have uses for capable and expendable labor like that for courier tasks or unobtrusive information gathering.

[]: Re: What do you think Gendo was like at Shinji's age?             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jun 24, 2016 9:12 pm ShinjiNeverGivesUp wrote: Was he already a total badass like he is during the main story?

[]: Re: What do you think Gendo was like at Shinji's age?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Fri Jun 24, 2016 9:48 pm Well, there was that time he punched Ramiel in SIRP. The rogue bull thing is probably a dubism. Fuyutsuki says it in voice over when he first meets Gendo. The platinum transcripts say that his first impression was simply "distaste" though. Maybe it's just the voice acting, but the younger Gendo pre-Yui's death always comes across as insufferably smug to me, like he's determined to piss off whoever he's talking to. Shinji has a couple moments where he acts like that too.

[]: Re: What do you think Gendo was like at Shinji's age?             Quote Post by TrumpetsGo » Wed Jul 20, 2016 9:23 am middle age?....

[]: Re: What do you think Gendo was like at Shinji's age?             Quote Post by BC Baron » Wed Jul 20, 2016 4:10 pm If one's age can be considered a state of mind, then I don't think Gendo ever truly was Shinji's age.

[]: Re: What do you think Gendo was like at Shinji's age?             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Sat Jul 23, 2016 2:35 pm At the end of the Manga they do show a short of what Gendo was like in university were he met Yui it seemed to point to a wayward loner who was kind of cold and wants to be left alone, which made me think that he might have had come from an abusive home of some kind, I think he probably treats Shinji much like his own father treated him and I found it really sad in the manga that he just wanted nothing to do with him after Yui vanished and was very quick to shove him on to Yui's family.

[]: Re: What do you think Gendo was like at Shinji's age?             Quote Post by ShinjiNeverGivesUp » Mon Feb 26, 2018 9:01 pm Reichu wrote: ......Was Gendo at ANY point a "total badass"?

[]: Re: What do you think Gendo was like at Shinji's age?             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Mon Feb 26, 2018 10:40 pm I bet he was like Shinji, but even more troubled.

[]: Re: What do you think Gendo was like at Shinji's age?             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Tue Feb 27, 2018 12:28 am ShinjiNeverGivesUp wrote: Gendo is super hardcore and cool! I first watched Eva when I was 9, and I wanted to grow up to be just like him.

[]: Re: What do you think Gendo was like at Shinji's age?             Quote Post by Stillborn » Tue Feb 27, 2018 1:16 am xanderkh wrote: Gendo is probably the LAST person you want to emulate as a grown up. Sure, he seems "cool", calm, and collected, but that's because he's pretty much cast all pretense of his own humanity aside for his own goals. He's willing to sacrifice anything if it means he can get what he wants, including his own son if that's what it takes. Trust me, if you were on the receiving end of Gendo, I don't think you'd want to be like him.

[]: Re: What do you think Gendo was like at Shinji's age?             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Tue Feb 27, 2018 2:10 am ^ That maybe so, but history has shown time and time again that people who use such power are doomed to fall because they don't rely on anyone but themselves. That's the whole problem when everyone is playing the long-game of power, everyone wants the cake for themselves. And the thing about Gendo's motivation? It was all towards getting Yui back, but because of his actions towards both innocent people and especially his son, Yui REJECTED him, the very person he was risking everything to "save". And emulating Shinji? There's more than a far share of people who act like Shinji or at least behave like Shinji here on the forums themselves, and I don't think the universe is screwing them over. Myself included.

[]: Re: What do you think Gendo was like at Shinji's age?             Quote Post by ShinjiNeverGivesUp » Tue Feb 27, 2018 3:38 am xanderkh wrote: Gendo is probably the LAST person you want to emulate as a grown up. Sure, he seems "cool", calm, and collected, but that's because he's pretty much cast all pretense of his own humanity aside for his own goals. He's willing to sacrifice anything if it means he can get what he wants, including his own son if that's what it takes. Trust me, if you were on the receiving end of Gendo, I don't think you'd want to be like him.

[]: Re: What do you think Gendo was like at Shinji's age?             Quote Post by Stillborn » Tue Feb 27, 2018 8:07 am xanderkh wrote: And the thing about Gendo's motivation? It was all towards getting Yui back, but because of his actions towards both innocent people and especially his son, Yui REJECTED him, the very person he was risking everything to "save". And emulating Shinji? There's more than a far share of people who act like Shinji or at least behave like Shinji here on the forums themselves, and I don't think the universe is screwing them over. Myself included.

[]: Re: What do you think Gendo was like at Shinji's age?             Quote Post by ErgoProxy » Tue Feb 27, 2018 9:55 am Stillborn wrote: As for you? Don't worry. Your EoE is apparently still to come, or there's not enough Shinji in you

[]: Re: What do you think Gendo was like at Shinji's age?             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Tue Feb 27, 2018 10:48 am Stillborn wrote: As for you? Don't worry. Your EoE is apparently still to come, or there's not enough Shinji in you

[]: Re: What do you think Gendo was like at Shinji's age?             Quote Post by Stillborn » Tue Feb 27, 2018 11:48 am ErgoProxy wrote: Should I understand this line so that you already live in your post-EoE world, and still nobody have emerged back from LCL to keep you company, because you actually are Gendo?

[]: Re: What do you think Gendo was like at Shinji's age?             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Tue Feb 27, 2018 11:56 am ^ You know, it IS possible to NOT exploit people and be the better man and HELP others. You can still be as savy as Gendo, but put your saviness to GOOD use and help others.

[]: Re: What do you think Gendo was like at Shinji's age?             Quote Post by Ray » Fri Jun 24, 2016 7:43 p
